plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize OpenAI js Copilot Remote Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option in the "New Project" dropdown menu within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Type 'Teams Agent with Data' into the dropdown field labeled 'Select an option' within the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" interface in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Teams Agent with Data" option from the dropdown menu in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Type the text 'Customize' into the dropdown field labeled 'Select an option to load your data' within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to select the "Customize" option in the dropdown within the "Teams Agent with Data" search bar in Microsoft Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm the selection of the "Default folder" within the "Workspace Folder" dialog in Visual Studio Code's Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
